summary: PR #2640 reworked VS Records mnDiagram source shapes in src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c and made a small static header update, improving the mndiagram TU fuzzy text match from 92.70628% to 96.47131% and increasing matched functions from 30 to 33. The evidence emphasizes sorting, popup, cursor, and table-rendering rewrites, with local materialization of mndiagram constants to avoid .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Primary decomp source update for mnDiagram sorting, popup, cursor, table rendering, local helpers, struct field naming, stack/local-shape changes, and assert/report shape changes.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: adds GET_DIAGRAM macro, mnDiagram_SumFighterKOs, mnDiagram_AllPlayTimesZero, mnDiagram_SumNameKOs, mnDiagram_MainOverlay, STATIC_ASSERT, renamed arrow_anim/cursor_anim fields
human_pr_text: rework VS Records diagram sorting, popup, cursor, and table-rendering source shapes

key_files.role: Small static header update associated with mndiagram matching work; exact changes are not present in the loaded diff excerpt.

what_changed.text: Added GET_DIAGRAM(gobj) as a typed wrapper around HSD_GObjGetUserData(gobj), replacing several direct mnDiagram_804D6C10->user_data accesses in loaded hunks.
Split repeated KO and play-time scans into static inline helpers: mnDiagram_SumFighterKOs, mnDiagram_SumNameKOs, and mnDiagram_AllPlayTimesZero.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: static inline int mnDiagram_SumFighterKOs(u8 field_index)
diff_excerpt: static inline int mnDiagram_SumNameKOs(u8 field_index)
diff_excerpt: static inline int mnDiagram_AllPlayTimesZero(u8 name)

what_changed.text: Reshaped fighter and name sorting code in mnDiagram_8023FA6C and mnDiagram_8023FC28 using explicit iterator pointers, totals arrays, selection/insertion-style movement, and PAD_STACK(12).
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_8023FA6C changes totals setup, dst_iter, candidate, max_idx shifting, PAD_STACK(12)
diff_excerpt: mnDiagram_8023FC28 changes dst_iter, tp, mnDiagram_SumNameKOs, and max_idx shifting

what_changed.text: Renamed mnDiagram_AnimTable fields x58 and x64 to arrow_anim and cursor_anim, and updated popup/arrow animation callsites to use the clearer field names.
Separated popup user-data and main-overlay layout concerns by changing mnDiagram_PopupData text count, adding a size STATIC_ASSERT, and adding mnDiagram_MainOverlay for a six-text layout use.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: typedef struct mnDiagram_MainOverlay ... HSD_Text* text[6]

what_changed.text: Adjusted mnDiagram_80241310 allocation/assert shape: allocation now uses sizeof(mnDiagram_PopupData), and NULL handling expands to OSReport plus __assert using strings from the animation table.

Converted several labeled/goto-style arrow visibility scans in mnDiagram_802417D0 into while/do-while loops with targeted gotos for exit labels, and added explanatory comments for arrow visibility behavior.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: loop1/loop2 rewritten as while(count > 0) with do-while and right_done label
diff_excerpt: loop3/loop4 rewritten as do-while with fc_right_done label

what_changed.text: The PR body reports three new matched functions and ten additional unmatched-item improvements, with bot report confirming the same three new matches and ten improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: 📈 10 improvements in unmatched items

smart_moves.text: Kept constants materialized locally rather than chasing only text-shape changes, explicitly tying the choice to avoiding .sdata2 regression.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Keep mndiagram constants materialized locally so `.sdata2` does not regress.

smart_moves.text: Used small static inline helpers to isolate repeated sum/check logic while preserving callsite-specific matching shapes in the sorting functions.
Improved reviewability by naming animation-table fields according to observed use sites, without renaming unrelated address-style globals.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: callsites use arrow_anim for arrow JObjs and cursor_anim for cursor animation

smart_moves.text: Added a struct-size assertion after narrowing popup text storage, making the recovered layout assumption explicit in source.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For menu/UI matching code, separating repeated aggregate scans into static inline helpers can improve matches while making the intended data operation clearer, as shown by KO and play-time helper extraction in mnDiagram.

When recovering struct layouts used by multiple UI objects, split distinct layouts instead of forcing one struct to cover all cases; this PR narrowed popup data and added a separate main-overlay struct.
For code-matching PRs that touch local constants, track data-section impact explicitly; this PR states local materialization was retained to avoid .sdata2 regression and reports .sdata2 improvement.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Keep mndiagram constants materialized locally so `.sdata2` does not regress.

naming_conventions.name: GET_DIAGRAM(gobj)
naming_conventions.rationale: Typed local shorthand for HSD_GObjGetUserData when retrieving Diagram user data.

naming_conventions.name: arrow_anim
naming_conventions.rationale: Renames AnimTable x58 based on arrow animation callsites in mnDiagram_802417D0.

naming_conventions.name: cursor_anim
naming_conventions.rationale: Renames AnimTable x64 based on cursor animation callsites in mnDiagram_PopupAnimProc.

naming_conventions.name: mnDiagram_SumFighterKOs / mnDiagram_SumNameKOs / mnDiagram_AllPlayTimesZero
naming_conventions.rationale: Helper names describe local aggregate/check behavior observed in the extracted loops.

naming_conventions.name: mnDiagram_PopupData / mnDiagram_MainOverlay
naming_conventions.rationale: Separate names distinguish popup user data from main overlay data where text array sizes differ.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: typedef struct mnDiagram_PopupData with text[5]
diff_excerpt: typedef struct mnDiagram_MainOverlay with text[6]

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used narrow PAD_STACK adjustments in sorting functions, changing PAD_STACK(16) to PAD_STACK(12) in loaded hunks.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Loaded PR evidence reports build/validation and score improvements, but does not isolate PAD_STACK as the sole cause.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted local declaration order and lifetimes in mnDiagram_InputProc, mnDiagram_80241310, mnDiagram_802417D0, and sorting code to alter generated code shape.

diff_excerpt: local declarations reordered in mnDiagram_80241310
diff_excerpt: local declarations reordered in mnDiagram_802417D0
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is supported by diff shape and score improvements, but no per-local objdiff rationale is loaded.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replaced generated-looking label ladders with while/do-while loops while preserving targeted exit labels for matching in mnDiagram_802417D0.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: loop1/loop2 removed and while/do-while introduced
diff_excerpt: right_done, fc_right_done, dn_name_done labels remain

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used explicit pointer iterators and offset-based accesses to shape sorting loops for mnDiagram_8023FA6C and mnDiagram_8023FC28.
Expanded HSD_ASSERTREPORT into OSReport plus __assert using table-backed strings in mnDiagram_80241310.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This is an observed source-shape tactic for this PR, not a general recommendation to expand assert macros.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Separate local aggregate scans into static inline helpers when it improves menu matching and readability
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mnDiagram, repeated fighter/name KO summations and an all-play-times-zero check were extracted to static inline helpers, contributing to reported improvements including full matches for mnDiagram_8023FA6C and mnDiagram_GetLeastPlayedFighter.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use separate local structs when UI user-data layouts diverge
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2640 split mnDiagram popup user data from main overlay data after recovering different HSD_Text array sizes, adding STATIC_ASSERT coverage for the popup layout.

source_update_candidates.title: Code-matching PRs should document local constant materialization when needed to avoid data-section regression
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2640 explicitly kept mndiagram constants materialized locally so .sdata2 would not regress while improving text-section matches. Consider adding this as an example under literals/data ownership or text-before-data matching: local constants may be retained when PR evidence ties them to section stability and reports the section delta.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Keep mndiagram constants materialized locally so `.sdata2` does not regress.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is consistent with existing standards about not chasing data blindly, but the PR provides a concrete positive example of preserving local constants to avoid section regression.

source_update_candidates.title: mnDiagram path owns VS Records diagram sorting/popup/cursor/table rendering work
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mndiagram.c was the primary file for VS Records diagram sorting, popup, cursor, and table-rendering source-shape work in PR #2640.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Rework VS Records diagram sorting, popup, cursor, and table-rendering source shapes.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could improve path-level search/routing for future mnDiagram decomp work; should be curated as a path fact only if source corpus accepts PR-derived path descriptions.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize the OSReport plus __assert expansion as a preferred style; this PR only shows it as a local matching shape for mnDiagram_80241310.
Do not infer human reviewer approval beyond merge status; no human review comments are loaded.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(12) as a general rule for mnDiagram sorting; loaded evidence shows use and score improvements but not isolated proof.
